signals.npcLine: Whispers say something’s off with CHIP’s core protocols.
signals.questPulse: Find anomalies in CHIP network nodes before blackout.
signals.worldFeed: Data spikes around CHIP detected; stability unknown.
signals.clueEvent: Glitch signs near CHIP clusters spark rumors of sabotage.

signals.npcLine: RAVE circuits pulse with mysterious energy tonight.
signals.questPulse: Trace RAVE signal distortions for a hidden message.
signals.worldFeed: RAVE sector network shows unusual rhythmic bursts.
signals.clueEvent: Unusual RAVE node resonance correlates with city unrest.

signals.npcLine: AAVE’s vault defense protocols rumored compromised.
signals.questPulse: Investigate breaches in AAVE data fortresses.
signals.worldFeed: Security alerts spike around AAVE’s core hubs.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted leak detected near AAVE stronghold.

signals.npcLine: OPG node farms show unexpected growth patterns.
signals.questPulse: Map OPG expansions and anticipate market ripple effects.
signals.worldFeed: OPG ecosystems evolving; potential market impact ahead.
signals.clueEvent: New OPG clusters emerge in under-monitored sectors.

signals.npcLine: PENGU caches under cold surveillance; moves uncertain.
signals.questPulse: Extract intel on PENGU’s frozen asset movements.
signals.worldFeed: PENGU activity shifts stall; fear grips traders.
signals.clueEvent: Silent PENGU transactions hint at deeper game.
